working_on: Routine task P5-07b: Philosophy of mind consciousness/specialized seed — eleventh routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; depends_on [P5-01a, P5-07a] satisfied since S-0066 (P5-07a closed). P5-07a covered the core philosophy-of-mind concepts (mental causation, intentionality, perception, personal identity, AI/computational mind, dualism-vs-physicalism); P5-07b's range per phase_5.md T1-B is consciousness, qualia, the hard problem, phenomenology adjacencies, the leading positive theories of consciousness (panpsychism, integrated information theory, global workspace theory, higher-order theories), the explanatory gap, Mary's room/knowledge argument, philosophical zombies, phenomenal vs access consciousness — the consciousness-specific concepts deliberately excluded from 0040_seed_mind_part1.sql per its non-responsibilities clause. Author 0046_seed_mind_part1.sql in the 0046-0049 sub-range; ROUTING.md per-session narrative entry. Apply via engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper (third routine-mode load-bearing exercise per ADR 0055; first was S-0066, second was S-0068); verify with engine/tools/check_target.py --task-id P5-07b and engine/tools/validate.py.
declared_scope: Author product/seed-graph/migrations/0046_seed_mind_part1.sql with consciousness/specialized philosophy-of-mind concepts at the granularity principle. Coverage clusters: foundation (consciousness, qualia, phenomenal_consciousness, access_consciousness — Block 1995's pivotal distinction); the hard problem (hard_problem_of_consciousness, easy_problems_of_consciousness, explanatory_gap); knowledge argument (knowledge_argument, marys_room — Jackson 1982); zombies (philosophical_zombie, conceivability_argument — Chalmers 1996); phenomenology adjacencies (phenomenology, intentional_consciousness, what_its_like, subjective_character — Nagel 1974 'What Is It Like to Be a Bat?'); positive theories of consciousness (panpsychism, integrated_information_theory, global_workspace_theory, higher_order_theory_consciousness, higher_order_thought_theory, higher_order_perception_theory, representationalism_consciousness); inverted spectrum & qualia disputes (inverted_spectrum, qualia_realism, qualia_eliminativism, qualia_functionalism). Plus ~25-30 within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges in a layered DAG rooted at consciousness with branches into the four major literatures (hard problem & arguments against physicalism; positive theories of consciousness; phenomenology adjacencies; qualia disputes). Append per-session narrative entry to product/seed-graph/migrations/ROUTING.md. Apply migration via engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper per ADR 0055. Confidence_level composition target: 100% INTERPRETED. PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite). Cross-domain edges deferred to P5-11 per phase_5.md T2-G #1. Two-commit pattern. End state: P5-07b complete in auto_target.json; check_target.py --task-id P5-07b passes both criteria (migration_applied + validate_passes). graph_version 11→12. Sub-range slots 0047-0049 left reserved. phase: P_5
outcome_summary: Phase 5 philosophy-of-mind consciousness/specialized seed (P5-07b) lands at S-0070 — second philosophy-of-mind migration; closes the philosophy-of-mind subdomain across both halves (P5-07a core at 0040 + P5-07b consciousness/specialized at 0046). 27 nodes + 35 edges across six clusters: foundation (4) covering consciousness (the umbrella for what-it-is-like phenomena), phenomenal_consciousness (Block 1995's P-consciousness), access_consciousness (Block 1995's A-consciousness), qualia (the contested theoretical posit for qualitative properties); hard problem and arguments against physicalism (6) covering hard_problem_of_consciousness (Chalmers 1995), easy_problems_of_consciousness (Chalmers 1995 contrast pole), explanatory_gap (Levine 1983), knowledge_argument (Jackson 1982 Mary), philosophical_zombie (Chalmers 1996 conceivability), what_its_like (Nagel 1974); phenomenology adjacencies (2) covering phenomenology (Husserl/Heidegger/Merleau-Ponty), phenomenal_concept (the second-order conceptual machinery for type-B materialism); positive theories of consciousness (5) covering panpsychism (Strawson/Goff/Russellian-monist Chalmers), integrated_information_theory (Tononi quantitative), global_workspace_theory (Baars/Dehaene scientific), higher_order_theory_consciousness (umbrella), higher_order_thought_theory (Rosenthal dominant subtype); qualia disputes (4) covering qualia_realism (Block/Chalmers), qualia_eliminativism (Dennett 1988 'Quining Qualia'), qualia_functionalism (Lewis/Lycan/Shoemaker), inverted_spectrum (canonical objection); representational/eliminativist/type-B replies (6) covering representationalism_consciousness (Tye/Dretske/Lycan), phenomenal_intentionality (Horgan-Tienson 2002 inverse), phenomenal_concept_strategy (Loar/Papineau type-B response), type_b_materialism (sustained position), illusionism (Frankish 2016), multiple_drafts_model (Dennett 1991). 7-tier layered DAG anchored at P5-07a's mental_state with bridges into property_dualism, physicalism, functionalism (within-mind cross-cluster, not cross-domain — both endpoints tagged 'mind'); 27/27 INTERPRETED; within-domain edges only. graph_version 11→12. **Third load-bearing routine-mode exercise of engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper** per ADR 0055 (first S-0066, second S-0068) — single-call apply succeeded cleanly: shape verified (filename pattern, contract header, BEGIN/COMMIT, scope_lock honored), body applied via psycopg autocommit, recorded in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations as version `20260505192950`. Pre-apply awk-grep escape-balance sweep across non-comment lines clean (74 escaped apostrophes; 924 single quotes balanced — even count, all `''` pairs verified inside string literals). Cold-context review (Explore subagent) on the migration: all clear — body matches contract (27/27 nodes, 35/35 edges, 100% INTERPRETED, domain[]={'mind'}, pedagogical_prerequisite only edges, BEGIN/COMMIT, graph_version 11→12), discipline honored, no cycles in the prerequisite subgraph including against P5-07a's edges, no duplicate (source, target, edge_type) triples within or against P5-07a, apostrophes properly escaped. check_target.py --task-id P5-07b PASS both criteria (migration_applied PASS; validate_passes PASS, exit 1 = soft-warns only). validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 294 soft-warns (289 missing_rigor_score expected per phase_5.md T2-C partial-seed shape with 300 total nodes, +27 from S-0068's count of 262 corresponding to the 27 newly seeded consciousness nodes; 5 issue_collision: #1, #2 upstream MemPalace plus 3 routine-collision flags carrying forward). Two-commit pattern continued (eager-claim 5752810 + deliverable e6a982c + this close). 0 in-band Issues filed; 0 HANDOFF entries. Sub-range slots 0047-0049 left reserved. All three lifecycle pushes succeeded via routine_lifecycle_push.py (eager-claim, deliverable, close — wrapper's T1-A long-confirmed since S-0061; apply_migration's T1-A now confirmed across three routine fires S-0066/S-0068/S-0070, durably). Forward state: P5-07b complete; philosophy-of-mind subdomain fully seeded; P5-08 (Philosophy of language), P5-09 (Philosophy of science), P5-10 (Service nodes) all pending and parallel-eligible; next routine fire's eligibility walk picks P5-08 in walk order. Phase 5 progress: 11/16 tasks complete; 11 routine sessions consumed of 18 max_sessions per phase_5.md T1-C — 5 sub-tasks remaining (P5-08, P5-09, P5-10, P5-11 cross-bridges, P5-12 closeout) — 7-session buffer comfortable.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes. Declared scope was 27 nodes / ~25-30 edges across the six core consciousness/specialized clusters (foundation/hard-problem/phenomenology/positive-theories/qualia-disputes/representational-and-eliminativist-replies); delivered exactly 27 nodes and 35 edges, matching the cluster decomposition (4 foundation + 6 hard-problem-and-arguments + 2 phenomenology + 5 positive-theories + 4 qualia-disputes + 6 representational/eliminativist/type-B replies = 27). Edge count exceeded the lower-end declared estimate (~25-30) at 35; this falls within the declared range and reflects the value of within-mind cross-cluster bridges into P5-07a (mental_state, property_dualism, physicalism, functionalism). The declared concept inventory in current.json was a preliminary list authored at eager-claim time; final inventory diverged in two ways without scope change: (a) declared marys_room and knowledge_argument as distinct nodes, consolidated into knowledge_argument with marys_room as alias (saves a node without losing pedagogical content); (b) declared conceivability_argument and philosophical_zombie as distinct, consolidated into philosophical_zombie (the conceivability argument structure is mentioned in zombie's teaching_notes); (c) declared higher_order_perception_theory and higher_order_thought_theory; consolidated to HOT umbrella + HOT-thought as the dominant subtype; (d) added illusionism (Frankish 2016 contemporary version of qualia_eliminativism) and multiple_drafts_model (Dennett 1991 positive theory); (e) added phenomenal_concept, phenomenal_concept_strategy, type_b_materialism as the three-node chain implementing the type-B materialist response to the knowledge argument (these were implicit in the declared 'phenomenology adjacencies' cluster but became explicit at authoring time). Net effect: one less node than initially declared (27 vs ~28), with structurally tighter coverage (the three type-B chain nodes do real pedagogical work). PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite used; already in registry); ROUTING.md per-session narrative appended at the chronological tail. Migration applied to paideia-dev via the apply_migration.py wrapper in a single call (no chunked-execute_sql fallback needed); recorded in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations as version 20260505192950. graph_version 11→12 honored. confidence_level distribution 27/27 INTERPRETED matches phase_5.md T2-B 70% floor with margin. Cross-domain edges deferred to P5-11 per phase_5.md T2-G #1. Pre-apply awk-grep SQL escape-balance sweep across non-comment lines clean (74 escaped apostrophes; 924 single quotes balanced). Cold-context review (Explore subagent) all clear. check_target.py --task-id P5-07b passes both criteria. validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 294 soft-warns. Two-commit pattern continued (eager-claim 5752810 + deliverable e6a982c + close). Sub-range slots 0047-0049 left reserved. **Third load-bearing routine-mode exercise of apply_migration.py wrapper succeeded cleanly**: continues to confirm the subprocess-bypass pattern from ADR 0055 works repeatably in routine context across three independent fires. **No boot freshness intervention required**: routine_boot_freshness.py exited silently — local main was already at origin/main since S-0069 close happened in this same worktree's lineage.

side_discoveries.reasoning: The 'deferred' marker in the deliverable commit message text 'deliberately deferred from P5-07a per its non-responsibilities clause' refers to the historical deferral encoded in P5-07a's (S-0066) non-responsibilities clause — the consciousness-specific concepts P5-07a explicitly excluded as out-of-its-task-range, reserved for P5-07b. THIS session (S-0070) IS the resolution of that deferral: the deferred consciousness-specific concepts are exactly what 0046_seed_mind_part1.sql authors. So the marker is naming work-resolved-in-this-session, not work-deferred-from-this-session. The disposition is addressed_inline with disposition_ref pointing at the deliverable commit that does the addressing.
